## Issue Type

- [ ] Broken source URL
- [ ] Claim correction
- [ ] Duplicate claim
- [ ] New claim suggestion
- [ ] Data/schema/tooling issue

## Affected Record

Claim ID or file path:

## Description

What should be changed, corrected, or reviewed?

## Evidence

Please include reliable source links. For new or corrected claims, prefer
peer-reviewed, government, court, WHO/UN, regulator, or independent NGO sources.

## Notes

If the source is industry-funded or operator-provided, label it clearly as
source critique, self-report, or commercial estimate.
